## What & why

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New detector / detection improvement
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tests / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `python benchmark/run.py` still reports 100% precision/recall, 0 false positives
- [ ] If this touches detection: I added a benchmark case (vulnerable **and** a safe look-alike)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` contents committed
